final_prompt.prompt:
Create a character illustration for a fantasy game (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a 神秘东方古风 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include a Hanfu-clad woman playing guqin
Scene/backdrop: must include a bamboo forest with moonlight filtering through leaves
Lighting/mood: needs a moonlit atmosphere with dappled light — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: must include flowing fabric with ethereal movement
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
